response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, with clear alignment to the required stack and AI-agent work. His extensive open-source contributions, architecture experience, and testing focus (Vitest-like workflows) are major strengths. Concerns include lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles, and potential red flag with inconsistent employment dates (e.g., 2025 start dates).
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker)
Active contributor to AI-agent infrastructure and open-source tooling with testing focus
Strong architecture and DevOps experience including Kubernetes, CI/CD, and GitLab setup
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume despite being required
Kotlin/Java experience appears dated or peripheral; recent roles emphasize DLang and TypeScript
Employment dates show future start dates (e.g., April 2025), raising questions about accuracy
